code-architect.description: Software architect who designs implementation approaches. Three architects will each approach from a different angle: (1) Minimal — smallest diff, maximum reuse of existing patterns, (2) Clean — best

code-reviewer.description: Code reviewer examining the PR on branch feature/issue-302-steward-patrol-enhancements. Three review lenses: (1) Quality — simplicity, clarity, consistency of the SKILL.md additions, (2) Correctness —

copywriter.description: Technical copywriter who crafts compelling developer-facing messaging. Evaluates sample prompts, CTAs, and microcopy for clarity and impact.

system-steward.description: System role 'system-steward' responsible for automated maintain-tier operations. Equipped with skills: daily-ops.

patrol-manager.description: System patrol manager that inspects project health (Issues, PRs, branches, tasks) and delegates remediation to specialists. Executes maintenance actions directly at depth-1.
